findings.description: Header layout changed from multi-column to single-column
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the header contains a logo, department name, and official names arranged horizontally in distinct sections separated by a vertical line. In the HTML, these elements are stacked vertically in a single column.
The date 'June 21, 2022' is centered on the page in the PDF, but left-aligned in the HTML.

findings.description: Page footer incorrectly inserted into reading flow
findings.evidence: The footer content from the bottom of PDF page 1 ('NC DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES...') has been inserted into the middle of the document's main text flow on HTML page 2, interrupting the paragraphs.
